mapper.insert: insert into kh_drug_interaction (drug_id1, drug_id2, drug_id3, severity_level, mechanism, source_site) values (#{drugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{drugId3,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{severityLevel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{mechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sourceSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update kh_drug_interaction set severity_level = #{severityLevel,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, mechanism = #{mechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = now() where drug_id1 = #{drugId1,jdbcType=BIGINT} and drug_id2 = #{drugId2,jdbcType=BIGINT}
